textareas:
Hi,

I read through your job post and the delivery risk is clear: you need someone who can own the implementation details, not just wire together a generic workflow.

Relevant fit:
- Built production Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Node systems for SaaS products and internal tools
- Used OpenAI, Claude, automation tooling, and MCP-style integrations in real client and product work
- Comfortable with both application delivery and the debugging needed to stabilize brittle automations

If the stack and scope line up, I can help you move this from unclear requirements to a working system quickly.

Best,
[Your Name]
